title: U.S. Department of the Treasury Releases Guidance on Clean Fuels Production Credit
content: The U.S. Department of the Treasury (Treasury) and Internal Revenue Service (IRS) have released guidance on the Clean Fuels Production Credit (section 45Z). Section 45Z provides a tax credit for the production of transportation fuels with lifecycle greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions below 50 kilograms of CO2e per mmBTU. The credit is in effect in 2025 and is for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and non-SAF transportation fuels produced after 31st December 2024 and sold before 31st December 2027.
author: Analysts Account
